message:
fix: complete asupersync tokio migration for slack, google-calendar, sandbox, oauth, streaming

Replace direct tokio dependencies with fcp-async-core across multiple
crates: slack connector, google-calendar connector, fcp-sandbox,
fcp-oauth, fcp-google-discovery, fcp-streaming. Fix slack connector.rs
test helper that still referenced tokio::runtime::Builder after the
Cargo.toml change. Add missing fcp-async-core dependency to fwc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1456,10 +1456,10 @@ mod tests {
     where
         F: std::future::Future<Output = T>,
     {
-        tokio::runtime::Builder::new_current_thread()
+        fcp_async_core::runtime::Builder::new_current_thread()
             .enable_all()
             .build()
-            .expect("build tokio test runtime")
+            .expect("build test runtime")
             .block_on(future)
     }

@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ path = "src/main.rs"
 anyhow.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
 clap = { workspace = true, features = ["derive", "env"] }
+fcp-async-core.workspace = true
 fcp-core.workspace = true
 fcp-cbor.workspace = true
 fcp-crypto.workspace = true
